CRANK_SETUP_002 — runtime OTP < 26.

`Crank.PurityTrace` requires `:trace.session_create/3` (OTP 26+). The
guard runs at boot in `Crank.Application.start/2` and at the start of
`mix crank.check` (synthetic via `--otp-release N`).

Exercised by:
- test/crank/application_test.exs — boot guard behaviour.
- test/mix/tasks/crank.check_test.exs — the synthetic-OTP-25 test
  asserting `mix crank.check` fails with this code.
